items.title: EpochGuard integration into flush path
items.description: Wire page reclamation into production flush. Pages currently grow without bound on FileIo. collect_freeable() exists but not invoked.

items.title: Custom page cache tuning
items.description: LRU cache exists but needs optimization per Gemini review. Most significant missing piece for production perf.

items.title: Data page CRC32c checksums
items.description: Shipped in PR #247. CRC32c on data pages; WAL upgraded from FNV32 to HMAC-SHA384 chained format with per-record WalProvenance (26 bytes). Tamper-proof chain: each tag covers prev_tag + provenance + data. 33 WAL tests.

items.title: Multi-writer concurrency
items.description: 64-stripe partitioned locks (PR #247): FNV-1a hash routes writers to independent stripes — concurrent writes to different partitions proceed in parallel. CoW snapshots keep reads non-blocking. Deadlock-free via sorted lock ordering. ConflictGraph tracks cross-partition conflicts. Note: full SSI write-skew prevention is still roadmap (not yet wired into tx::transaction::commit()).

items.title: Wire standalone modules into store
items.description: Partial: REWG, CBAC, EACB, RDKC are fully integrated. Remaining: Domain Decay, HAPC, EPIC, SCD, CBQ, TER, EBA, 5-Vertex not yet wired into the main store path.

items.title: CBAC (Context-Aware Access Control)
items.description: Shipped. 6-state governance circuit breaker with CAS semantics (141 source tests, CodeGraph-canonical). REWG graph-derived entitlements wired (27 tests). EACB threshold signatures (21 tests). RDKC governance-bound cryptographic access control (95 source / 149 total tests). 321 adversarial gym tests across 28 files. ML-DSA-87 NIST ACVP-validated (session 744723, CNSA 2.0 Cat-5).

items.title: Confidence-Aware Learning Index
items.description: Replace B-epsilon lookup with learned index that incorporates confidence distribution. Research complete, implementation pending.

items.title: Encryption at rest
items.description: Shipped. AES-256-GCM-SIV per-page with governance-bound keys (unique key per page derived from 4 governance inputs). ML-KEM-1024 hybrid key transport. KAT-verified. NIST ACVP live pass: ML-KEM-1024 keyGen/encapDecap (session 744723, CNSA 2.0 Cat-5). Per-page nonce safety, structural key expiry, background re-encryption. 130 CAM tests.

items.title: Encryption in transit
items.description: Shipped — both legs live as of 2026-06-16. (1) Payload layer (Cat-5): X-Wing-1024 encapsulation wired into exchange layer — PR #2342 peer-mesh sealing, #2344 GNSE type-bound AAD, #2348 ML-DSA-87 signed auto key-exchange. (2) TLS KEX (hybrid Cat-3): X25519MLKEM768 via rustls + aws-lc-rs, pqc-tls-terminator crate (PR #2350), live on braidera.com — reproducibly verified via openssl s_client forced-offer test. Precision: TLS KEX is ML-KEM-768 (Cat-3); cert auth classical; api.digital-fabric.com ALB is classical at the socket (deploy gap, not code gap).

items.title: Full audit log export
items.description: Temporal log scan_temporal_window for administrative exports and compliance reporting.

items.title: Raft consensus production-ready
items.description: Shipped. 13 modules, 4,896 LOC, 106 tests. Core: leader election, log replication, compaction, persistence. Advanced: self-governing topology (WN-RAFT2-04, auto-demotion/promotion — 8 tests), state-as-intelligence publisher (WN-RAFT2-07, graph-queryable Raft state — 4 tests), entry dedup (WN-RAFT2-02, 3 strategies — 15 tests). Device lifecycle: register/deregister/heartbeat (22 device tests across 3 modules). 10/10 benchmarks green.

items.title: World graph federation (FWGA)
items.description: Shipped. 5-tier DeviceManifest, CBAC-enforced sync, quorum-as-confidence. Scope-change detection + ScopeChangeDelta triggers auto-rebalancing. Online device add/remove (zero-downtime). Progressive compaction. Read scaling near-flat (20.2–22.5µs for 10× data). Federated mesh with automatic rebalancing and self-draining conflict pipeline.

items.title: TEP Lane A: Semantic Foundation
items.description: View<T>, EBP, AssertionMeta, SyncEnvelope/SyncDelta, GovernanceArtifact. 5 files, 2,185 LOC, 51 tests. WN-TEP-01 through WN-TEP-05.

items.title: TEP Lane B: Lens API (WN-TEP-06 to 09)
items.description: Shipped. Composable filters (confidence, temporal, spatial, classification). Composition algebra (intersect/union at plan level). Compilation to TraversalPlan (cacheable, serializable). Serialization as GovernanceArtifact — every query produces an audit record. TEP semantic foundation: 51 tests.

items.title: TEP Lane C: Mesh Sync Protocol (WN-TEP-10 to 14)
items.description: 4-phase sync (watermark delta, conflict classification, confidence restoration, gap manifest) + Lens-filtered change streams. Serves Mesh agent topology and Apple cross-device.

items.title: TEP Lane D: In-Process API (WN-TEP-15 to 17)
items.description: TrustExchange trait, store integration, HintBatch. The canonical zero-copy Rust API that all other surfaces project from.

items.title: TEP Lane E: Wire Protocol (WN-TEP-18 to 21)
items.description: Protobuf schemas, gRPC service (QueryLens/Assert/Subscribe/Sync), Arrow Flight adapter, Arrow Flight SQL compatibility. External access for Polars, DuckDB, Tableau.

items.title: Python driver (PyO3)
items.description: Shipped. ~2,200 LOC, 4 named classes via PyO3 — merged FabricRS PR #231. Native Python bindings for data science and ML pipeline integration.

items.title: Swift bindings for Apple ecosystem
items.description: Shipped via C-FFI — merged FabricRS PR #148. 5 Apple target triples: iOS, iOS-sim, watchOS, watchOS-sim, darwin. Apple deep integration: power-shaped sync, Watch/AirPods delta sync codecs, Vision Pro spatial scoping. tvOS + visionOS aspirational.

items.title: Prometheus metrics exporter
items.description: Shipped. WAT + Prometheus exporter, 12 tests. OTel #[instrument] on 5 key store ops. 2 Grafana dashboards (overview + mesh health).

items.title: API documentation + getting-started guide
items.description: OpenAPI/protobuf docs, Lens query examples, TrustExchange trait documentation. Required for Protocol score 9.0+.

items.title: GUI administration panel
items.description: Web-based admin UI for browsing entities, confidence envelopes, provenance chains, graph edges. Requires wire protocol (WN-TEP-19).

items.title: Real-disk (NVMe) comprehensive benchmarks
items.description: Shipped. May 2026 EC2 benchmark suite on c6a.8xlarge, c6a.4xlarge, m7i.2xlarge. 7-paradigm leaderboard: TSBS (42.2M metrics/sec), LDBC IS-1 (296,610 QPS), YCSB-B (21.8M ops/sec), Multi-Modal (9.7ms), ClickBench (8.56s), VDBBench (4,894 QPS @ recall 0.958), SpatialBench SF1.

items.title: Comparative benchmarks vs competitors
items.description: Shipped. Head-to-head measured on identical hardware: TSBS 9.6× QuestDB world record; LDBC IS-1 148× Neo4j 5.26.25; YCSB-B 7.1× Redis pipelined; Multi-Modal 13.5× federated stack; ClickBench 1.92× ClickHouse; SpatialBench Q1 32× SedonaDB, 9.6× DuckDB, 894× GeoPandas.

items.title: Long-running soak tests
items.description: Multi-hour continuous workload tests to validate stability, memory leaks, and WAF under sustained load.

items.title: BraidDB-nvm crate: hardware-aware persistence stack
items.description: 26 source files, ~11K lines, 214 tests. Three-tier epoch persistence, platform fences, MmapBackend, CentralHashBuffer, adaptive config, write coalescer, confidence-weighted persistence, crash recovery. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: EpochWalWriter: WAL elimination from hot path
items.description: 3,000x storage energy reduction via LPSR preservation. Epoch batching keeps NVMe asleep. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: Platform fences: ARM64 + x86_64 inline assembly
items.description: ARM64 dc cvap/dsb/PRFM + x86_64 CLFLUSHOPT/SFENCE/_mm_prefetch. Hardware auto-detection for Apple Silicon, Graviton4, x86_64. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: Windows + Graviton optimizations
items.description: Windows VirtualLock/NUMA VirtualAllocExNuma. Graviton ARM64 Fargate: 20% cost, 30% perf. PRs #109–#186.

items.title: P1-07: Apple hardware power measurement
items.description: Real Apple Silicon power measurement with IOReport/powermetrics to validate NVM tier energy claims on M-series hardware.

items.title: EFS→EBS migration for NVM storage
items.description: Migrate from EFS to EBS (gp3/io2) for NVM-aligned block storage with consistent latency and IOPS provisioning.

items.title: io_uring wiring for async NVM I/O
items.description: Wire io_uring submission queue into NVM flush path for zero-copy async I/O on Linux. Replaces blocking msync calls.

items.title: BM25 fast path for NVM-backed search
items.description: NVM-optimized BM25 scoring with prefetched posting lists and confidence-weighted term frequency.
